changes: Restructured skill with separate HTML and CSV sections
Added explicit CSV-to-markdown guidance with Python code template
Emphasized using raw CSV column headers verbatim in table output
Added instruction to use human-readable labels in summary sections
notes: csv-to-md consistently scores 92/100 due to gemini-3-flash renaming CSV column headers to title-case (e.g., 'product_id' → 'Product ID') despite explicit instructions and code templates. The test requires both original CSV header names AND capitalized forms due to a quirk in the test's OR logic. This is a model behavior limitation — gemini-3-flash prioritizes aesthetic formatting over verbatim reproduction.
